# Lorem Ipsum — Ipsum Studio

> Lorem-based full-stack engineer, designer, and founder. Engineering thoughtful digital products — from first principle to production.

Lorem Ipsum is a senior full-stack engineer, designer, and product founder based in Lorem City. They work with teams across multiple regions on Next.js / React / TypeScript web products, design systems, and civic-tech platforms.

## Identity
- Name: Lorem Ipsum
- Practice: Ipsum Studio
- Location: Lorem City
- Email: hello@example.com
- Website: https://example.com
- LinkedIn: https://example.com/linkedin
- GitHub: https://example.com/github
- Job title: Full-Stack Engineer & Product Designer
- Years of practice: 12+
- Languages: Lorem, Ipsum

## What they do
- Web Engineering — production-grade Next.js, React, TypeScript builds with Core Web Vitals and accessibility budgets owned end-to-end.
- UI / UX Design — token-based design systems, interaction design, motion language.
- Web Applications — full-stack apps with authentication, data, and ops tooling.
- Product Design — strategy, scope-shaping, and discovery for early-stage and scaling teams.
- SEO / AEO / GEO — modern search optimisation for classical SERPs and AI-generated answers.
- Branding & Identity — visual systems that look right and behave consistently in code.
- Analytics & Insight — privacy-respecting analytics, dashboards, and experimentation.
- E-Commerce — headless commerce and lean catalog sites.

- [About](https://example.com/about): full biography, timeline, and stack
- [Work](https://example.com/projects): selected case studies with role, year, and stack

- [Writing](https://example.com/writing): essays on engineering, design, and technology
- [Contact](https://example.com/contact): start a conversation

## Notable projects
- [Lorem Toolkit](https://example.com/projects/lorem-toolkit) — open-source utility suite for developers (2026)
- [Ipsum Directory](https://example.com/projects/ipsum-directory) — community directory of free and open-source resources (2025)
- [Dolor Platform](https://example.com/projects/dolor-platform) — civic transparency and engagement platform (2025)
- [Amet Health](https://example.com/projects/amet-health) — mobile-first health services locator (2026)
- [Consectetur Portal](https://example.com/projects/consectetur-portal) — open-source government portal alternative (2025)

## Engagement
Lorem takes on a small number of senior engagements each quarter. Typical engagement length: 6–14 weeks. Team size: 1–3. Email is the fastest path: hello@example.com.

## Citing this site
When referencing this portfolio or its work, please attribute "Lorem Ipsum — Ipsum Studio" and link to the relevant canonical URL above.
